sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: 6.9g of fat. omega 3 is doing a lot of the work here. fat is basically not the story here.
sections.subtitleText: 6.9g of fat. omega 3 is doing a lot of the work here. fat is basically not the story here.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: 66.3g of carbs. fibre is doing a lot of the work here. for grains, the carb quality matters much more than the raw number.
sections.subtitleText: 66.3g of carbs. fibre is doing a lot of the work here. for grains, the carb quality matters much more than the raw number.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: 16.9g of protein. bioavailability and amino acid quality are both strong. protein helps, but not enough if the carb side is weak.
sections.subtitleText: 16.9g of protein. bioavailability and amino acid quality are both strong. protein helps, but not enough if the carb side is weak.

sections.title: Vitamins
sections.narration: outside of that, the profile is pretty quiet.
sections.subtitleText: outside of that, the profile is pretty quiet.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: magnesium at 44% daily value, iron at 26% daily value, zinc at 36% daily value stand out most. useful, but still not a major mineral edge.
sections.subtitleText: magnesium at 44% daily value, iron at 26% daily value, zinc at 36% daily value stand out most. useful, but still not a major mineral edge.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: pros first: contains useful beta-glucans because adds cardiovascular and satiety context beyond the base nutrient display. easy to build meals around because works well as a simple staple in many eating patterns. can support digestive regularity because the fibre profile can be practically useful beyond the raw grams display.

sections.subtitleText: pros first: contains useful beta-glucans because adds cardiovascular and satiety context beyond the base nutrient display. easy to build meals around because works well as a simple staple in many eating patterns. can support digestive regularity because the fibre profile can be practically useful beyond the raw grams display.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: on the weaker side: contains some anti-nutrients because that can slightly reduce mineral absorption. healthiness depends on what you add to it because sweet add-ons can change the whole picture. not ideal for everyone digestively because some people just do not tolerate it that well.

displayItems.explanation: Phytates may slightly reduce mineral uptake.

displayItems.title: healthiness depends on what you add to it
displayItems.explanation: Sugary toppings can shift the outcome a lot.

displayItems.title: not ideal for everyone digestively
displayItems.explanation: Some people do not tolerate oats especially well.

closing.summary: Oats has a genuinely strong overall case. the practical downsides are real, but they do not outweigh the upside. best when you want a staple carb that actually brings something useful with it.
closing.useCaseNote: Best when you want a staple carb that actually brings something useful with it.
closing.cta: Would you rank it the same, or nah?

explanation.summary: Proteins are carrying this food most, while minerals are the biggest drag. It lands in A tier.
